message:
fix: relocate JSDoc comment for validateArtifact + cleanup unused imports

- Move validateArtifact JSDoc to correct location (was orphaned after adding reference validation code)
- Remove unused imports from session-replay.ts (OperatorIntervention, InterventionSummary types)
- Remove unused imports from session-replay.test.ts (SessionInputsSchema, SessionTraceSchema, etc.)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
